arts.sum: Arsenal are making a nice habit of developing young players for Mikel Arteta to call upon in training and matchday squads and they’ve now got...

arts.ttl: Yoane Wissa double sinks Bournemouth as on-loan Chelsea keeper Kepa pays for mistake
arts.sum: BRENTFORD 3-2 BOURNEMOUTH: Yoane Wissa scored twice as Thomas Frank's team came from behind on two separate occasions to defeat Andoni Iraola's side in a thriller

arts.sum: Can Arsenal end their winless streak against Cole Palmer and Chelsea in Sunday's London derby?

arts.sum: Chelsea play their final match before November’s international break at home to rivals Arsenal this weekend. Chelsea host Arsenal at Stamford Bridge on Sunday afternoon...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals Arsenal focus amid Cole Palmer threat
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is aware of Cole Palmer's abilities as Arsenal prepare to take on fierce rivals Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's dream Alexander Isak transfer scenario emerges as Arsenal learn brutal reality
arts.sum: Chelsea have been handed a potential boost in their reported pursuit of signing Newcastle striker Alexander Isak at the expense of Premier League rivals Arsenal. It has been reported that Isak has a desire to play Champions League football, which could see the striker seeking a move away from Newcastle if the club do not qualify for the competition next season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea could finally get dream Kylian Mbappe transfer opportunity
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe’s struggles at Real Madrid could be good news for Chelsea’ s hopes of signing the player in the near future, with the Blues previously linked with an interest in the French star. In the summer of 2023, the Times reported that Chelsea were one of the clubs showing an interest in buying Mbappe from PSG.

arts.ttl: Every Player Who Played for Arsenal and Chelsea in the Premier League (Ranked)
arts.sum: Ranking every player to have played for Arsenal and Chelsea in the Premier League era, including Jorginho, Kai Havertz and Cesc Fabregas

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Nelson explores Bundesliga move amid Arsenal frustration
arts.sum: According to sources, Nelson has reached out to Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta, expressing his desire for a permanent transfer to a club where he can truly establish himself following his loan at Fulham . It is a continuation of his struggles at Arsenal where he never became more than a squad player despite having shown promise out on loan at Hoffenheim in 2018/19 and Feyenoord in 2021/22.
